series_metadata.series_description: Covered employment tables for Ohio listing the number of persons employed and wages paid in a particular industry, e.g. manufacturing, industry, social services covered by unemployment compensation insurance.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 25 years or until superseded, obsolete or replaced and no longer of any administrative value to the Agency. Then transfer to State Archivist for review for possible retention or destruction. ; Electronic: Retain 25 years or until superseded, obsolete or replaced and no longer of any administrative value to the Agency. Then transfer to State Archivist for review for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
